_comment: [MOCK destination] — synthetic, public-only RSA-4096 JWK used as the Tier-1 JWE recipient key. There is NO private material here (no `d`/`p`/`q`), so this is safe to commit and addresses no real Behörde. Spec § 6.2/§ 13.2 #4. Generated once via jose generateKeyPair('RSA-OAEP-256',{modulusLength:4096}); the matching private key was discarded.
